mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(o.create_time, #{fmt}) as date, COALESCE(SUM(oi.profit), 0) as profit FROM order_item oi LEFT JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id WHERE o.create_time BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND oi.deleted = 0 AND o.deleted = 0 AND oi.profit IS NOT NULL GROUP BY date ORDER BY date

SELECT oi.product_name as productName, SUM(oi.quantity) as quantity, COALESCE(SUM(oi.profit), 0) as totalProfit, CASE WHEN SUM(oi.subtotal) > 0 THEN ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(oi.profit), 0) / SUM(oi.subtotal) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END as avgProfitRate FROM order_item oi WHERE oi.deleted = 0 AND oi.profit IS NOT NULL GROUP BY oi.product_id, oi.product_name ORDER BY totalProfit DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT o.customer_name as customerName, COUNT(DISTINCT o.id) as orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(oi.profit), 0) as totalProfit FROM orders o LEFT JOIN order_item oi ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE o.deleted = 0 AND oi.deleted = 0 AND oi.profit IS NOT NULL GROUP BY o.customer_id, o.customer_name ORDER BY totalProfit DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(profit), 0) as totalProfit, COUNT(DISTINCT product_id) as profitableProductCount FROM order_item WHERE deleted = 0 AND profit IS NOT NULL
